recommendations.title: Ghost Lab
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a haunting in their hospital, two doctors become dangerously obsessed with obtaining scientific proof that ghosts exist.

recommendations.title: The Blue Elephant
recommendations.overview: After a five-year hiatus, psychiatrist Yehia returns to work at Abbasiya Hospital. He’s assigned to evaluate a patient who turns out to be his old friend. As events unfold, Yehia uncovers dark secrets that challenge his understanding of reality.

recommendations.title: The Good Doctor
recommendations.overview: Dr. Martin Blake, who has spent his life looking for respect, meets an 18-year-old patient named Diane, suffering from a kidney infection, and gets a much-needed boost of self-esteem. However, when her health starts improving, Martin fears losing her

recommendations.title: Fragile
recommendations.overview: Haunted by memories of a patient's death, a nurse  takes a job at an antiquated hospital for children. Soon she learns that the kids fear a ghost that prowls the floors and will not allow anyone to leave. Amy tries to protect them and convince the ot

recommendations.title: K-PAX
recommendations.overview: Prot is a patient at a mental hospital who claims to be from a far away planet. His psychiatrist tries to help him, only to begin to doubt his own explanations.

recommendations.title: The Kingdom
recommendations.overview: At The Kingdom, Denmark's most technologically advanced hospital, a number of strange and otherworldly events begin occurring, much to the dismay of its doctors and patients. A ghostly ambulance appears and disappears, the voice of a little girl call

recommendations.title: The Possession of Hannah Grace
recommendations.overview: When a cop who is just out of rehab takes the graveyard shift in a city hospital morgue, she faces a series of bizarre, violent events caused by an evil entity in one of the corpses.

recommendations.title: The Stylist
recommendations.overview: Claire is a lonely hairstylist who secretly murders and scalps her clients. When Olivia makes the well-intentioned mistake of asking Claire to style her hair for her wedding, she becomes dangerously obsessed, and her sanity starts to slip away with b

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: A man wakes in a hospital with no memory, and quickly finds himself on the run in a locked down hospital with the Cartel on his tail.

recommendations.title: Patient Seven

recommendations.director: Rasmus Wassberg, Erlingur Thoroddsen, Johannes Persson, Dean Hewison, Paul Davis, Danny Draven, Joel Morgan, Nicholas Peterson, Ómar Örn Hauksson
